description: This file defines API route handlers for managing 'folders' within the NoteMaster Pro application. It includes CRUD operations such as create, list, update, and delete folders, utilizing FastAPI and SQLAlchemy for database interactions and authentication.

methods.name: create_folder( folder_data: schemas.FolderCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Handles creation of a new folder, ensuring no duplicate folder name exists for the user, and returns the created folder.

methods.name: list_folders( db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Retrieves and returns a list of all folders belonging to the authenticated user.

methods.name: update_folder( folder_id: uuid.UUID, folder_data: schemas.FolderUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Updates the name or color of an existing folder identified by UUID, with error handling if not found.

methods.name: delete_folder( folder_id: uuid.UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
methods.description: Deletes a folder by its UUID, ensuring it exists and belongs to the authenticated user.

ctags.name: create_folder
ctags.signature: ( folder_data: schemas.FolderCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )

ctags.name: delete_folder
ctags.signature: ( folder_id: uuid.UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )

ctags.name: list_folders
ctags.signature: ( db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )

ctags.name: update_folder
ctags.signature: ( folder_id: uuid.UUID, folder_data: schemas.FolderUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user) )
